title: Item default value with file
excerpt:
Hello everyone 
Do you know if we can put files (for example word docx) as a default item value in a file column so that each time I create a new item, the word docx file is already added in the row ? 
Thank you, 
Corent…

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone

Do you know if we can put files (for example word docx) as a default item value in a file column so that each time I create a new item, the word docx file is already added in the row ?

Thank you,

Corentin

posts.author: samanthal (Samantha Lim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @corentin.dalfarra! Thanks for your being a part of our amazing community!

If you still had questions regarding how to use the Files column in your workflow, please send us an email over to support@monday.com. We’re here to help!
